column16: This is the strongest evening-format tour product on Frenchmen Street; the operator also runs private custom jazz tours (e.g., the *Roosevelt's Rhythm & Roots* tour for The Roosevelt New Orleans hotel). A similar custom product for corridor lodging partners is feasible.
